events.title: Levain Build 1 — first refresh
events.detail: 1:1:1 ratio · 2 min mix · ripens in 6–9 hr

events.title: Levain Build 2 — final build
events.detail: 1:5:5 ratio · 2 min mix · ripens in 12–16 hr (slower ratio chosen to avoid a late-night refresh)

events.title: Gather ingredients
events.detail: 10 min active · 2 recipes · weigh per batch (2 containers)

events.title: Start autolyse — flour + water only
events.detail: 10 min mix × 2 containers = 20 min active · then 50 min rest · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule
events.equipStrip: · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule

events.title: Mix in salt + ripe levain
events.detail: 10 min mix × 2 containers = 20 min active · 30 min rest before fold 1 · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule
events.equipStrip: · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule

events.title: Stretch & fold 1 of 5
events.detail: 5 min × 2 containers = 10 min active · next fold in 30 min · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule
events.equipStrip: · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule

events.title: Stretch & fold 2 of 5
events.detail: 5 min × 2 containers = 10 min active · next fold in 30 min · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule
events.equipStrip: · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule

events.title: Stretch & fold 3 of 5
events.detail: 5 min × 2 containers = 10 min active · next fold in 30 min · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule
events.equipStrip: · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule

events.title: Mix muffin dough
events.detail: 10 min mix · (uses the shared ripe Build 2 levain)

events.title: Muffin dough bulk ferment
events.detail: 2 hr bulk ferment (uses the shared ripe Build 2 levain)

events.title: Stretch & fold 4 of 5
events.detail: 5 min × 2 containers = 10 min active · next fold in 30 min · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule
events.equipStrip: · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule

events.title: Gather ingredients
events.detail: 5 min active · weigh per batch (2 mixer loads)

events.title: Mix bagel dough
events.detail: 10 min mix × 2 batches = 20 min active (mixer holds max 10 bagels; all batches go into the same container for proofing) (uses the shared ripe Build 2 levain)
events.equipStrip: (mixer holds max 10 bagels; all batches go into the same container for proofing)

events.title: Stretch & fold 5 of 5 (last)
events.detail: 5 min × 2 containers = 10 min active · last fold, then bulk ferment · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule
events.equipStrip: · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule

events.title: Bulk ferment
events.detail: 4 hr warm bulk ferment until ready to shape · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule
events.equipStrip: · container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard | container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule

events.title: Bagel dough bulk ferment
events.detail: 2 hr bulk ferment (uses the shared ripe Build 2 levain)

events.title: Shape muffins
events.detail: 1 min × 24 muffins = 24 min total · 80 g each

events.title: Shape bagels
events.detail: 2 min × 12 bagels = 24 min total · divide into 138 g each

events.title: Bagels into fridge — cold proof
events.detail: 16 hr in fridge · boiled straight from cold

events.title: Start preshape (container 1 of 2: 8 × Sourdough Batard)
events.detail: Weigh & divide: 675 g each · 4 min × 8 loaves = 32 min total · first loaves rest naturally while you finish (no separate bench rest needed)

events.title: Start preshape (container 2 of 2: 6 × Sourdough Boule)
events.detail: Weigh & divide: 850 g each · 4 min × 6 loaves = 24 min total · first loaves rest naturally while you finish (no separate bench rest needed)

events.title: Bake 1 of 2 — bread into oven
events.detail:
10 min load · 40 min bake · 500°F
Deck 1: 4 × Sourdough Batard
Deck 2: 4 × Sourdough Batard
Deck 3: 3 × Sourdough Boule
events.equipStrip:
Deck 1: 4 × Sourdough Batard
Deck 2: 4 × Sourdough Batard
Deck 3: 3 × Sourdough Boule

events.title: Loaves out (batch 1 of 2)
events.detail: Pull batch 1, load batch 2 · reheat ~5 min to 500°F before next bake

events.title: Bake 2 of 2 — bread into oven
events.detail:
10 min load · 40 min bake · 500°F
Deck 1: 3 × Sourdough Boule

events.title: Muffins out of fridge
events.detail: 3 hr warm-up / final proof before bake

events.title: Bring the pot to a boil
events.detail: 15 min · bagels are boiled straight from the cold fridge

events.title: Mix focaccia dough
events.detail: 10 min mix · then 20 min rest · commercial yeast, no levain needed

events.title: Set the oven to 450°F
events.detail: 8 min — adjust from 500°F before this bake

events.title: Bake batch 1 of 2 — bagels into oven
Stretch & fold 1 of 4 — focaccia
events.detail: 5 min active · next fold in 15 min

events.title: Stretch & fold 2 of 4 — focaccia
events.detail: 5 min active · next fold in 15 min

events.title: Bake batch 2 of 2 — bagels into oven
Stretch & fold 3 of 4 — focaccia
events.detail: 5 min active · next fold in 15 min

events.title: Set the oven to 350°F
events.detail: 13 min — adjust from 450°F before this bake

events.title: Stretch & fold 4 of 4 (last) — focaccia
events.detail: 5 min active · then 75 min bulk ferment

events.title: Set the oven to 375°F
events.detail: 5 min — adjust from 350°F before this bake

events.title: Bake 1 of 1 — muffins into oven
events.detail:
10 min load · 12 min bake · 375°F
Deck 1: 16 × Sourdough English Muffins
Deck 2: 8 × Sourdough English Muffins
events.equipStrip:
Deck 1: 16 × Sourdough English Muffins
Deck 2: 8 × Sourdough English Muffins

events.title: Shape focaccia — transfer to pans
events.detail: 10 min × 1 pan = 10 min · oil pan, stretch dough to fit, dimple · 705 g per pan

events.title: Set the oven to 350°F
events.detail: 6 min — adjust from 375°F before this bake

events.title: Set the oven to 475°F
events.detail: 10 min — adjust from 350°F before this bake

events.title: Turn off the oven
events.detail: Baking done — oven off, cools to room temp

warnings.msg: Sourdough Batard, Sourdough Boule bakes earlier so everything fits in the oven — ready ~3.1 hr before its deadline.
Sourdough Bagels bakes earlier so everything fits in the oven — ready ~1.9 hr before its deadline.
Test Rolls bakes earlier so everything fits in the oven — ready ~89 min before its deadline.
Sourdough English Muffins bakes earlier so everything fits in the oven — ready ~32 min before its deadline.
Test Cookies bakes earlier so everything fits in the oven — ready ~38 min before its deadline.
2 active loaf steps fall outside kitchen hours (6 AM–10 PM) (Gather ingredients, Mix focaccia dough). Try a different loaf cold proof or bake time.
2 active muffin steps fall outside kitchen hours (6 AM–10 PM) (Gather ingredients, Mix focaccia dough). Try a different muffin cold proof or bake time.
2 active bagel steps fall outside kitchen hours (6 AM–10 PM) (Gather ingredients, Mix focaccia dough). Try a different bagel cold proof or bake time.
2 active focaccia steps fall outside kitchen hours (6 AM–10 PM) (Gather ingredients, Mix focaccia dough). Try a different bake time.

6 active steps for Test Cookies fall outside kitchen hours (6 AM–10 PM) (Gather ingredients, Mix focaccia dough, Mix & knead — batch, Gather ingredients — batch). Try a later deadline or a different bake time.

6 active steps for Test Rolls fall outside kitchen hours (6 AM–10 PM) (Gather ingredients, Mix focaccia dough, Mix & knead — batch, Gather ingredients — batch). Try a later deadline or a different bake time.
Hands-on steps overlap: "Stretch & fold 3 of 5" and "Gather ingredients" both need you around 10:34 AM. You can only do one at a time — consider staggering them.
Hands-on steps overlap: "Stretch & fold 3 of 5" and "Mix muffin dough" both need you around 10:34 AM. You can only do one at a time — consider staggering them.
Hands-on steps overlap: "Boil batch 1 of 2" and "Shape — batch 1 of 2" both need you around 6:03 AM. You can only do one at a time — consider staggering them.
Hands-on steps overlap: "Boil batch 1 of 2" and "Top batch 1 of 2" both need you around 6:03 AM. You can only do one at a time — consider staggering them.
Hands-on steps overlap: "Shape — batch 1 of 2" and "Top batch 1 of 2" both need you around 6:04 AM. You can only do one at a time — consider staggering them.
Fermentation and levain timing assume a 70°F proofing temperature (default). Set your kitchen's proofing temp in the Kitchen tab for more accurate timing.
